programmes.show_description: This channel is currently off air.
Jeremy Wade travels to one of the few rivers left on the planet that will still test a fisherman - the Congo. He is on the trail of a terrifying legend - the spirit Mami Wata. (HD)
In the latest episode of Sport Stories, Tommy Martin catches up with former Premier League referee Dermot Gallagher. (SL,HD)
A train crash leads to tragedy for a young family and a race against time for Dr Banner, and Stella comes to terms with her past when an unwelcome face appears in the hospital. (HD)
Daria and Emma have seven days to drop some pounds for a party. Bridesmaids Emma and Elisa test drive a six week diet plan. And Dom and Adam prepare to slim over four months. (HD)
In a series of 20 half hours, we chronicle the news and highlights of the last 20 years in this archive and music-based series. (SL,HD)

Alan Quinlan sits down with Joe Molloy to look back at his Ireland career having won 27 caps over a 9 year period. (HD)
Paul O'Grady returns to South Africa, Zambia and Namibia on the trail of young orphaned animals (HD)
Hotel Benidorm will take the viewers not only to one of the meds favourite towns, Benidorm, but also behind the scenes in one of the resort's most popular hotels. (HD)

Brian McFadden presents the dining challenge show. Today, former Miss England Danielle Lloyd plays mystery host to four strangers at her palatial home. (HD)
From Canada's waterlogged wilderness come stories of a twenty-foot lake monster that attacks humans. Freshwater detective Jeremy Wade tries to track down this shadowy predator. (HD)
Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz. (HD)
A woman is accused of slamming her car door into a parked vehicle; a woman says a car salesman stole the $1,000 she left as collateral on a car. (HD)
Brian Dowling and his fashion-forward design team are on a mission to prove that you can achieve the home renovation of your dreams without it literally costing the earth. (HD)
Love Island UK returns for a twelfth series, offering the ultimate summer of fun, romance and drama. (HD)
A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more. (HD)
